SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE PAYMENTS PAY SET PAY.PAYOUT_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.itemDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') , PAY.PAYOUT_REPORT_ID = ${param.reportId} , PAY.NOTES = (SELECT DECODE(PAY.NOTES,NULL,NULL,PAY.NOTES||' ')|| TO_CHAR(CDP1.CDP_DIV_NUMBER)|| '/'|| ${param.reportId} FROM CANDIDATE_DIVIDEND_PAYMENTS CDP1 WHERE CDP1.CDP_TRANSACTION_NUMBER = PAY.TRANSACTION_NUMBER AND CDP1.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode}) WHERE PAY.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND PAY.TRANSACTION_NUMBER IN (SELECT CDP2.CDP_TRANSACTION_NUMBER FROM CANDIDATE_DIVIDEND_PAYMENTS CDP2 WHERE CDP2.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
